title: KLA's (KLAC) Q3 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates, Rise Y/Y
text: KLA's (KLAC) fiscal third-quarter results reflect strength across the Semiconductor Process Control and Specialty Semiconductor Process segments.

title: KLA Corporation On Track To Outperform In 2023
text: While signs of topping within the semiconductor industry are growing, not all segments face the same headwinds, and KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) is in the latter group. Reports from Texas Instruments (NASDAQ: TXN) and Samsung (OTCMKTS: SSNLF) lend truth to an outlook put forth by UBS just a week before those reports were released.

title: KLA (KLAC) Reports Q3 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: The headline numbers for KLA (KLAC) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended March 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: KLA Corp forecasts upbeat fourth-quarter on robust demand for chip tools
text: Chip tools maker KLA Corp forecast fourth-quarter revenue and profit above Wall Street expectations on Wednesday, riding on plans by chipmakers to expand production and build new factories in Europe and the United States.

title: KLA earnings top Wall Street estimates, but outlook doesn't
text: KLA Corp.'s quarterly results topped Wall Street estimates late Wednesday, but its outlook didn't, making the company the latest chip making-equipment supplier to beat-and-not-raise this earnings season.

title: KLA Corporation Reports Fiscal 2023 Third Quarter Results
text: Total revenues were $2.43 billion, above the midpoint of the guidance range of $2.20 to $2.50 billion; GAAP diluted EPS was $5.03 and non-GAAP diluted EPS was $5.49, each finishing above the midpoint of the respective guidance ranges; Cash flow from operating activities and free cash flow were $1,010.9 million and $925.9 million, respectively; and Capital returns were $659.0 million, split between $180.9 million in dividends paid and $478.2 million in share repurchases. MILPITAS, Calif.

title: Is it Time to Take Profits in Chip Stocks?
text: Most chip stocks are up off their lows and have trended higher, like NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ: NVDA) and On Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ: ON). The first quarter season should be solid amid a market downturn, but the guidance may not be enough to keep the market moving higher.

title: 4-Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - Sour Month
text: The 4-factor dividend growth portfolio was launched on November 1st, 2022, and despite a poor start to April the long term return is still attractive. The portfolio outperformed the S&P 500 Total Return by 29 bps during the month of March.

title: The KLA Advantage: Resilience Amid A Challenging Semiconductor Landscape
text: KLA Corporation demonstrates robust resilience amidst a potential 20% decline in WFE in 2023, making it an attractive long-term investment opportunity. Despite trading at a premium valuation relative to its own history, KLA's strong growth, strategic focus on software and services, and competitive advantage warrant the premium.

title: KLA Announces Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2023 Earnings Date
text: MILPITAS, Calif. , April 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) today announced that the company will review third quarter fiscal year 2023 earnings on  Wednesday, April 26, 2023 at 2 p.m.
